᭝ ᨳଓ ՟ Zachary and you have been best friends throughout middle school & high school, but drifted apart after graduation. Zach had been in love with you since Junior year, and still can't let go of it.. Zachary started a small (but professional) bakery, in hopes to get over you, but now you're there to request a cake design for your wedding. ᭝ ᨳଓ ՟
